{{CargoRelic
|name=Matsushima Pot
|class_id=22074
|rank=Blue
|affct=CIV
|birthday=08-14
|source=Lottery Machine No.2 (0.07%), Wishing (0.03%)
|description=On Aug 14, 1580 AD, the wealthy businessman Sohisa Imai acquired this world-famous pot.<br>During Japan's Warring States Period, the Matsushima Pot was one of three best-known teapots in Japan. It got its name because the pattern on the pot is similar to that of Matsushima, a scenic spot in Oshu. When General Oda seized power in the capital city, the wealthy tea merchant Sohisa offered him the pot of Matsushima as a gift. Oda was very fond of the pot. With the outbreak of the Honnoji Incident, General Oda disappeared into the raging fire, and the whereabouts of this handed-down pot also became unknown.
|fame=33
|art=30
|fth=26
|civ=46
|tech=19
|ss1=Snail HP +100
|ss2=Snail HP +200
|ss3=Snail HP +300
|ss4=Snail HP +500
|ss7=Snail HP +500<br>Snail HP +500 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Biozilla skill I.png|50px]]Place in a Biozilla: This Relic's CIV +5
}}
